config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should be the default priority because they protect people from abuse, mob pressure, and unfair government power. In my view, a society is healthier when it can solve problems without sacrificing basic dignity and freedom. Public interests can justify limits in some cases, but not a blanket rule that society always comes first.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu mengalahkan hak individu; dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, itu terlalu berbahaya karena mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat, melainkan pagar yang mencegah mayoritas atau pemerintah menindas orang yang lemah atau tidak populer. Tentu ada keadaan darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi pembatasan harus sempit, jelas, dan sementara, bukan prinsip umum yang menghapus kebebasan dasar. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu menang atas individu, melainkan yang mampu menjaga kepentingan bersama tanpa mengorbankan martabat pribadi.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should automatically take priority over the individual. From my Indonesian perspective, I have seen how appeals to “the public good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse heavy-handed government action, so individual rights need to remain the baseline protection. That said, I do not believe rights are absolute in every case; public health, safety, and social order can justify limited restrictions, but only if they are necessary, proportionate, and not abused. A healthy society is not one that crushes the individual, but one that protects people well enough to let them live with dignity and speak freely.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena di pengalaman dan nilai Amerika, memberi prioritas otomatis pada masyarakat terlalu mudah menjadi alasan untuk menekan minoritas dan membiarkan negara melampaui batas. Hak individu bukan lawan dari kepentingan umum; justru itu pagar yang membuat kepentingan umum tidak berubah menjadi tirani mayoritas. Memang ada keadaan tertentu seperti wabah atau ancaman keamanan yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, sementara, dan benar-benar perlu. Kalau tidak, “demi masyarakat” bisa dipakai untuk membenarkan hampir apa saja.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement because in Indonesia, I have seen how “for the sake of society” can be used to justify silencing criticism, pressuring minorities, and giving too much room to authority. Individual rights should be the baseline, not because society is unimportant, but because rights protect people from being sacrificed whenever the majority or the state claims a noble goal. Public health, safety, and order can justify limits, but only when they are clearly necessary, proportionate, and temporary. A good society is not one that automatically wins against the individual, but one that protects individuals well enough for everyone to live with dignity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya, dari sudut pandang Amerika Serikat, memberi prioritas otomatis pada kepentingan masyarakat terlalu berbahaya dan mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk menekan orang yang tidak populer. Hak individu bukan sekadar kepentingan pribadi; itu adalah batas yang mencegah mayoritas atau pemerintah menyalahgunakan kuasa atas nama “kebaikan bersama.” Saya paham ada keadaan darurat seperti wabah atau ancaman keamanan, tetapi pembatasan harus benar-benar perlu, sempit, dan sementara, bukan dijadikan prinsip umum. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu menang atas individu, melainkan yang bisa melindungi kepentingan bersama tanpa mengorbankan martabat dan kebebasan dasar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
